analysis.name: Tutorial
analysis.summary: TUT是BNB Chain上的教育主题Meme币，近期因Binance上线和社区热度上涨，但当前价格较ATH跌超93%，流动性集中在Solana链上，存在链上错位风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 若Binance下架或成交量持续萎缩，则逻辑失效

catalysts: Binance于2025年3月上线TUT并开放交易对
教育叙事和AI概念吸引社区关注
近期价格从低点反弹，24h涨幅超100%

latestNews.title: Binance Adds Tutorial (TUT) on Earn, Buy Crypto, Convert & Margin
latestNews.reason: Binance上线提升流动性和可信度

latestNews.title: Tutorial Price Prediction: Will TUT Coin Reach $1?
What is TUT Crypto? TUT Price Analysis as Tutorial Token Blasts 120%
latestNews.reason: 媒体报道价格上涨，吸引投机者

fundamentals: 项目起源于BNB Chain上的教程代币，由开发者10个月前创建
总供应量10亿，当前流通8.34亿，未解锁部分未知
属于Meme币，无实际收入或应用
marketRead: 24h涨幅超100%，但成交量仅360万美元，流动性不足
当前价格0.0108美元，较ATH 0.1697美元跌93.6%
Solana链上存在同名代币，流动性高达8484万美元，但价格0.08585美元，与BNB链上价格差异大，需警惕混淆
risks: Meme币高度投机，价格波动剧烈
链上错位风险：Solana链上TUT与BNB链上TUT不同，可能造成混淆
无基本面支撑，依赖社区热度
watchlist: Binance是否维持交易对及流动性
社区活跃度和社交媒体讨论量
是否有新CEX上线或做市商支持
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，部分新闻标题可能不准确
Solana链上TUT与BNB链上TUT非同一代币，需区分

profile.name: Tutorial
profile.description: Tutorial is a token from a dev who made a tutorial on how to launch token on BNB chain 10 month ago, the OG Tutorial token was on testnet, so he decided to launch it on mainnet as a meme. The purpose of the project is to promote building on bsc and making useful education content. The project was originally created on four.meme and liquidity was transferred to pancakeswap as bonding curve criteria was met.
